summary: Comprehensive testing of Roller Hockey Hub completed. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in 5 POST endpoints. All 23 backend API tests pass (100%). All frontend pages load correctly with proper navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: All POST endpoints that insert into MongoDB should exclude _id before returning response - this was the root cause of 500 errors

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, navigation works, forms functional)

seed_data_creation: Test data created during backend tests with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core functionality working. Backend API 100% functional. Frontend pages: Dashboard, Calendar, Members, Championships, Attendance, Statistics, Messages, Settings all load correctly. Team selector and user menu work. Login/logout flow works. Email notifications are MOCKED (Resend API).

mocked_apis.email_notifications: MOCKED - Resend API not configured, emails logged but not sent

pages_tested.login: ✓ Form works, redirects to dashboard on success
pages_tested.dashboard: ✓ Shows upcoming events, convocations, stats cards
pages_tested.calendar: ✓ Shows calendar with events, create event button
pages_tested.members: ✓ Shows staff and players, team filter works
pages_tested.championships: ✓ Shows championship cards, create button visible
pages_tested.messages: ✓ Team list, chat area, message sending works
